@startuml

participant "generate_delta_main.cc" as main
participant "delta_diff_generator.cc" as delta
participant "payload_file.cc" as payload
participant "payload_generation_config.cc" as config

[-> main : "--dynamic_partition_info_file"

activate main
main -> main : brillo::KeyValueStore.Load(file)

main -> config : payload_config.target.LoadDynamicPartitionMetadata(store)
return

main -> config : payload_config.target.ValidateDynamicPartitionMetadata()
return

main -> delta : GenerateUpdatePayloadFile()
activate delta

delta -> payload : payload.Init(config)
activate payload
payload -> config : manifest_.dynamic_partition_metadata
return
return

note right of delta : generate payload data

delta -> payload : payload.WritePayload()
activate payload
payload -> config : manifest_.SerializeToString()
return
payload -> config : Write(serialized_manifest.data())
return

deactivate delta

delta --> main
[<-- main : done

@enduml
